programs.title: Mojo Swoptops
programs.desc: Can Mojo and Bo get three puzzling passengers across Lake Swoppiton at once?

programs.title: Vida the Vet
programs.desc: When Tidbit gets a big mosquito bite on picture day, he doesn't want a photo because he doesn't look like himself. Popcorn can't fix this, but he does know something that could help ... face paint!

programs.title: Flower & Flour
programs.desc: Dirk promises to read Flower and Flour a bedtime story but when he's too tired to continue, Flower has to step in and invent her own bedtime story.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.desc: Peppa and her friends are introduced to some simple woodcraft in the woods with Mr Wolf.

programs.title: Bluey
programs.desc: When Uncle Rad and Frisky accidentally turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo on the same night, they have to work together to make Bluey feel better about babysitter putdowns.

programs.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programs.desc: When one of the Baby Pea-Rexes gets the hiccups, Ginger and the other two try all manner of cures to get rid of them.
